rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
content_words: base-K positional code + color category + twist flag

results.title: Knowledge Capsules: Structured Nonparametric Memory Units
results.note: Structured nonparametric memory capsules as multi-attribute primitives directly overlap with multi-channel memory keys; no quipu terms but strong functional & semantic match to combinatorial-channel external memory.

results.title: H-MEM Hierarchical Memory High-Efficiency Long-Term Reasoning
results.note: Candidate explicitly contrasts with H-MEM; hierarchical multi-layer memory with positional indexing is the same architectural family (subsidiary/parent + position code), functionally near-identical.

results.title: GAM Hierarchical Graph-based Agentic Memory
results.note: Graph-guided MULTI-FACTOR retrieval with hierarchical decoupled encoding maps almost one-to-one to partial-channel/multi-channel retrieval with subsidiary hierarchy.

results.title: ByteRover Agent-Native Memory LLM-Curated Hierarchical Context
results.note: Hierarchical context-curated external memory; same architectural class as QUIPU-MEMORY's parent/subsidiary external memory store.

results.title: Choosing How to Remember Adaptive Memory Structures
results.note: Adaptive memory structure selection for LLM agents covers structured/multi-channel storage variants; conceptually overlapping with channel-based encoding choices.

results.title: Memory Mechanisms in LLM Agents (Survey)
results.note: A-MEM entity-centric attribute-value structured memory notes with contextual links = orthogonal attribute channels + cross-entry connections; very strong functional match to QUIPU multi-channel + subsidiary linking.

results.title: Memory in LLMs Mechanisms Evaluation Evolution
results.note: Taxonomy with memory quadruple (storage/persistence/access/control) frames the same channel-based access pattern; functional overlap above threshold.

results.title: H-MEM EACL 2026
results.note: H-MEM with Mix-of-Experts retrieval gating on semantic+recency+importance dimensions = multi-channel weighted retrieval, isomorphic to partial-channel mask retrieval on orthogonal channels.

fail_reason: All 8 retrieved results are existing LLM external/hierarchical memory architectures (Knowledge Capsules, H-MEM x2, GAM, ByteRover, Adaptive Memory, A-MEM, LLM memory taxonomy) whose multi-attribute / multi-factor / attribute-value / hierarchical-subsidiary mechanisms collapse onto QUIPU-MEMORY's multi-channel orthogonal-encoding + partial-mask retrieval + subsidiary-exception structure; every result clears sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7, yielding 8 hits (>=1) - the candidate is not novel.
